name: Pumnpkin Bread - Pan-1
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Place all dry ingredients (bread flour, sugar, dry milk, salt, butter) in the bread pan.
3. Add the cooked and mashed pumpkin, water, and dry yeast into the bread pan.
4. Close the cover and place it on the machine.
5. Select the "Rapid" mode setting.
6. Press the start button to begin baking.
